details: Paper 113 confirms compound 6a 'white crystals (98%) of 6a, mp 72-73 °C'; DOI 10.1021/acsomega.6c01037 present in paper.
Paper 004 confirms '3f Brown solid; 164.61 °C'; DOI 10.1021/acsomega.5c12576 present in paper.
Paper 093 names compound 23 as '4-(4"-phenyl-Δ3-thiazoline-2"-acetylazino)-4'-acetyl-thiosemicarbazone diphenyl sulphide' and Table II row 23 shows '300°C, EtOH/H2O (1:1)'.

Paper 086 confirms compound 4i 'Yield 26.6%; m.p. 110-111°C'; DOI 10.3390/80100186 present. Name copied verbatim from paper (paper itself missing 'amino', but Q1 not failed since name is from source).
Paper 028 confirms compound 5j with the long IUPAC name and 'mp: 192-195 °C'; DOI 10.3390/ijms242216359 present in paper.
Paper 014 confirms compound 29 'N-(Azocinylamino)methylenebisphosphonic acid (29) was obtained with a 44% yield; mp. 230-231 °C'; DOI 10.3390/ph19020256 present.
Paper 130 confirms '4,5,6,7-Tetrachloro-2,2-diphenyl-1,3-benzodioxole (14): 26%; colorless prisms; mp 152-153 °C'.
Paper 165 confirms '1-Indanone: mp 40°C'; DOI 10.3390/60300279 present.
Paper 011 confirms compound 5i with the long pyridazinone name and 'mp = 150-151 °C (EtOH)'; DOI 10.3390/molecules31040699 present.
Paper 139 Table 2 row '4-NO2 16 58 230 expl. 215 dec.' confirms 4-nitroiodylbenzene decomposition at 230 °C.
Paper 074 confirms gold(III)-NHC compound 13 'orange solid of m.p. 105 °C (dec.)'; DOI 10.3390/ijms27042032 present.
Paper 006 confirms compound 12 '(pyrrolidin-1-yl)methanone (12): Orange solid, mp 243°C-245°C'; DOI 10.1002/ardp.70227 present.
The mp 145-147 °C in paper 033 belongs to compound V4 (5-(2-nitrobenzylidene) isomer); the extracted name '5-(4-Chlorobenzylidene)' is V3 which has mp 244-246 °C. Name and value mismatched.
Paper 010 confirms compound 31 '(E)-3-([1,1'-Biphenyl]-4-yl)-N-(adamantan-1-yl)acrylamide (31) ... Mp 171-173 °C'; DOI 10.3390/ijms27041716 present.
Paper 070 confirms compound 2b 'White crystals, m.p. 75-78 °C (cyclohexane), Yield 1.5 g (63%)'; DOI 10.3390/molecules31050862 present.
Paper 102 names compound 17a as '10H,11H,12H-dihydroquino[2,3,4-kl]acridine' and reports 'amorphous powder; m.p. 186°C'.
Paper 127 confirms compound 7 '2-Methyl-6-{[4-phenyl-1,3-thiazol-2(3H)ylidene]amino}quinolin-4-ol (7) ... mp 305-306°C'.
Paper 099 confirms compound 13 (a tetramethyl ... dodecacyclo[...]pentatriaconta-...-tetracarboxylate diacetate) 'colourless solid; yield: 72 mg, (93%), mp 245-247 °C'.
Paper 114 confirms compound 12p 'Brown solid; yield: 73%; MP = 228-230 °C'; DOI 10.1039/d5ra09311b present.
Paper 175 confirms compound 5d '2-(piperidin-1-yl)naphtho[2,3-d]thiazole-4,9-dione (5d) ... Mp: 221-222 °C'.
Paper 172 confirms compound 26c-1 (triisopropylbenzenesulfonate) '[α]D25 = -5.44 (MeOH, c = 0.5); mp: 55-57 °C'.
Paper 105 confirms '4-(Trans-2-butenyl)-5-methyl-3-phenyl-4H-1,2,4-triazole (7) ... Mp. 103-104 °C'.
Paper 050 Table 1 row '1k C20H23ClN2S 358.9 Cl 4-C4H9 183-184 82' confirms 6-chloro-3-(4-butylphenyl)quinazoline-4-thione mp 183-184 °C; DOI 10.3390/81100756 present.
Paper 014 confirms 'N-(Isobutylamino)methylenebisphosphonic acid (13) was obtained with a 58% yield; mp. 215-216 °C'; DOI 10.3390/ph19020256 present.
Paper 139 Table 1 row '3-Me B 71 153-55 154' confirms 3-Methyl-1-(diacetoxyiodo)benzene mp 153-155 °C.
